title: Add animations with Framer Motion to Next.js / React
summary: Integrate Framer Motion into a Next.js or React project ‚Äî motion components, variants, page transitions, layout animations, scroll-triggered effects, and gesture-based interactions.
declaration: I will add Framer Motion animations to your Next.js or React project. This covers installing the library, basic motion components, variants for coordinated animations, page transition effects, and scroll-triggered animations. Framer Motion requires Client Components in Next.js App Router ‚Äî I'll show you how to wrap the parts that need animation correctly.
